notableEvents.label: Ceddanne Rafaela GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela grounds into a double play, third baseman Kyle Karros to second baseman Willi Castro to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Mickey Gasper out at 2nd. Ceddanne Rafaela out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andruw Monasterio pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andruw Monasterio flies out to center fielder Cole Carrigg.

notableEvents.label: Connor Wong pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Connor Wong grounds out softly, first baseman TJ Rumfield to pitcher Brennan Bernardino. Marcelo Mayer to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Andruw Monasterio pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andruw Monasterio flies out to left fielder Mickey Moniak. Caleb Durbin to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Jake McCarthy triples (4) on a ground ball to left fielder Jarren Duran. TJ Rumfield scores. Hunter Goodman scores. Cole Carrigg scores.
